vocab.meaning: phần thiết yếu, không thể thiếu
vocab.example: Carrying a high-capacity power bank is part and parcel of my daily routine since I'm always on my phone for work.
I always try to travel light when I go out, so I usually just slip my credit card and phone into my pocket.

vocab.meaning: mang theo đủ thứ đồ đạc, gần như tất cả mọi thứ
vocab.example: My mother is the type of person who carries everything but the kitchen sink in her handbag, just in case of an emergency.

vocab.meaning: vật bảo hiểm, phương án dự phòng
vocab.example: I always keep some emergency cash tucked away in my phone case as a safety net if my digital wallet fails.

vocab.meaning: luôn sẵn có, trong tầm tay
vocab.example: I prefer having my smartphone with me at all times because it keeps the world's information right at my fingertips.

vocab.meaning: để phòng hờ, phòng khi cần đến
vocab.example: I typically carry a lightweight cardigan in my bag, just in case the air conditioning in the mall is too cold.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích hoặc nhu cầu
vocab.example: When I'm heading to a coffee shop to work, this compact messenger bag really fits the bill for carrying my tablet.

vocab.meaning: mang theo bên mình (thường là vật cồng kềnh hoặc nhiều thứ)
vocab.example: I rarely venture out without my professional camera gear in tow, especially when I'm visiting a scenic part of the city.
I always keep a small Swiss Army knife in my pocket; you'd be surprised how often it comes in handy for minor tasks.

vocab.meaning: ghi nhớ, lưu tâm (thường nói về việc nhớ mang theo đồ)
vocab.example: When I head out for a long hike, I have to bear in mind the need for extra water and a physical map.
